ford_b_max_job_note_50a3aa8e4f.text: B-Max shares the Fiesta Mk7 electrical/key architecture. The Ford master workbook records OEM reference 1756409 for the keyed family.

ford_b_max_job_note_ae72f8fe0c.text: Use only where push-button start is physically confirmed. The Ford master workbook records OEM reference 1713499 for the smart-key family.

verification.notes: Duplicate wording is collapsed in this index. Each note remains traceable to the verified generation-specific records in models.json.
